commands.review_summary:
The branch makes keyless implicit isolated cron delivery return `ok:false` when its target comes only from the shared agent-main last target, passes sessionTarget-derived keys into resolution, and adds resolver/run/dispatch regression coverage including `deleteAfterRun` cleanup.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +494. Total +551 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source path: current main reads the shared main session entry for keyless implicit delivery and existing tests expect inherited `lastTo`; the contributor also supplied live Matrix after-fix proof. I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of a compatibility-sensitive fail-closed delivery policy, not a narrow automated repair.
